summary:
GEOPOLITICAL CONCERNS AND PREDICTIONS: Brandon discusses geopolitical tensions, focusing on the Israel-Gaza anniversary and referencing legislative actions in Canada, such as Bill C-8, which he believes will restrict internet access and freedoms. He details reports of Cuban citizens being recruited for the conflict in Ukraine, linking this to broader fears of biological smuggling and old alliances reforming against Western nations. Brandon also echoes claims from commentators like General Flynn about domestic infiltration and impending black swan events.

DOMESTIC INCIDENTS: Brandon expresses concerns over safety in the United States, pointing to a recent mass shooting at an Alabama college game and protests in New York City. He criticizes local government policies, specifically referencing ICE-free zones in Chicago, which he perceives as enabling gang violence and civil unrest. He views these socio-political issues as part of a coordinated effort to dismantle traditional order and peace in both large cities and small towns.

ALIENS AND NEPHILIM: Brandon shares visions involving extraterrestrial. He asserts that future alien visitations will be deceptive demonic manifestations designed to explain away the biblical rapture. Furthermore, he describes a vision of ancient, reptilian bloodlines linked to the Nephilim, the Aztecs, and the Mayans, claiming these entities are secretly influencing global royal families in Europe, Asia, and Saudi Arabia to orchestrate a grand deception.

SPIRITUAL COPING AND PROTECTIVE PRACTICES: Brandon addresses the fear his statements may cause, urging his listeners to combat anxiety through dedicated spiritual practices. He advocates for taking communion and reciting Psalm 91, asserting that believers are protected by invisible forces similar to the non-transparent angels he claims protected Corrie ten Boom during the Holocaust. Acknowledging the distressing nature of his content, Brandon advises those who feel overwhelmed by fear to prioritize their mental well-being and step away from his warnings, emphasizing the need for emotional grounding and spiritual resilience.
rawData: [October 07, 2025]-[Let's pray today]-[https://youtu.be/9VcafaPXeBI]-[Well, good morning, family, or evening, or afternoon, or wherever you are. Thank you for joining us again tonight here where I'm at. I just wanted to go over some things that we see in the news, and we're going to pray together. I thought there were some very pressing things. You know, tomorrow is a major day, October 7th, concerning the anniversary of the Israel-Gaza situation, and so we're going to pray into that. We're going to pray for protection over our nation. I've been alerted to some things that are concerning Cuba. If anybody remembers some of the prophetic words that I have given concerning Cuba and what's coming, I think this is very alarming for what we've seen today in the news and what we're hearing about Canada and what they're wanting to implement concerning the internet and your rights concerning your phone. I told you all that what I saw when I was praying, great persecution coming to Canada concerning religious freedom and freedom of speech, concerning what we would consider the First Amendment right here in America to be able to have the right to say what we want to say. And so we see Canada coming out today saying that they want to implement—I don't remember what the bill's name is. Do you see the bill? It's called Bill C-8. Protecting Canada from cyber threats. They're labeling it 'Protecting Canada from cyber threats.' Well, it looks like it's going to pass, but it gives them access without any explanation at all, or any kind of a warrant or anything. They can turn off your cell phone. They can turn off your computer, your home internet—all kinds of basically overreaching into your personal life, not allowing you to be able to say what you want to say anymore if they deem you a threat, with no warning. So, you're basically cut off from the world instantaneously by the push of a button. So, anybody who is on Canada's watch list or whatever, if they think you're radical or if you say too much, they'll just go, 'Hey,'—I don't remember the company's name that they're going alongside, but it's in this article if you would like to see it. I found this—Braden found this. People were asking me what it is. It's called Breathe Easy. I got it on Amazon. I don't know, it seems to work a lot when I breathe it. But I think this is terrible, and this is exactly what I warned you all was coming, all this pressure on the Canadian people, and that you would not be able to say the things that you want to say in the days ahead. This is basically what I see as prophetic confirmation as a watchman, bringing you things that the Spirit of the Lord tells us to talk about. Here is my cough drop. Goodness gracious. Bringing you things that the Lord tells us is coming. And this is a major thing that bothered me a lot because I know what's coming to Canada. I saw trying to be an iron curtain, similar to all your freedoms being stripped away. So here's a stage of it. And I told you, remember when I told you I saw the King of England stretching forth a scorpion tail? You might have to go get me some hot tea so I can finish this. I'm sorry. A scorpion tail reaching in and trying to sting other parts, but Canada linked up with the King of England. And I saw Emmanuel Macron in the background, and they all were linking up together, and they tried to form their own little alliance with finances and things like that as we see all that taking place. I said they will try to disarm you, which starts this month, from October to October of 2026. After that, you will no longer be able to have a firearm in Canada as a Canadian citizen. Then we see the persecution coming—thanks, Mom is making it. Then we see the persecution coming for freedom of speech and that they'll shut that down. So as that happens there, that spirit is the antichrist spirit. So we see, I said, you'll come against, and as the Canadians rise up, I saw Holy Ghost and fire coming on the churches in Canada. I saw Holy Ghost and fire coming on the people of Canada. And as they rose up inside, the glory of the Lord came in the way of a mighty rushing wind. And I'm telling you, the mighty move of God is coming to Canada with all of these major persecutions that you will maybe see, if we pray against all this stuff, but I'm telling you, I saw it happening. Then I saw the barrels rolling down, the whiskey barrels rolling down, and I saw the economy that was in trouble. And the Lord said great trying times would come upon it, and it would look like tribulation had already begun in some parts of Canada, but it has not. This is the beginning of sorrows. The Lord warned us about this. And I'm not trying to be doom and gloom for the people that live in Canada, but I'm trying to prepare you for what I have seen. But out of this, I saw a fresh oil coming from the people. As the olive press was pressing on the olives, and as the oil came forth, I saw a great mighty move of God coming upon the Canadians, but it came out of pressure. And then I saw it trying to go over Europe, and the antichrist spirit would try to come upon Europe. And I saw the same pressure, but this was with war. And I saw the tanks rolling across the land. And I saw it looked like, I told you, like a white Christmas whenever Bing Crosby is singing 'White Christmas' and the movie scene with World War II and the bombs going in the background. And this is the types and shadows of the things that I saw of escalation of war. But this one is the one that is concerning the most to me because it's really close to home. I saw an extension from Russia to Cuba, and the Lord said old alliances from the Cuban Missile Crisis will be revisited. There'll be old alliances come forth and you'll see old agreements coming forth. So, as we see this with Cuba today, that they are announcing in the Miami area—can you play this video?—Cuba secretly is sending troops to Ukraine to fight with Russia. And they have found over 5,000 for sure. And they're paying them $2,000 a piece. $2,000 a piece! And the average Cuban makes $20 a month. So they're saying if you come over here and fight this battle with us, we'll give you $2,000 a piece. So 5,000 people are supposed to have gone over there, and over 20,000 altogether. And they found already dead Cuban soldiers in this war. So, are you showing them? Yeah. So, this is in the news today. This is what I warned you was coming. And I saw in the middle of the night, I saw Russian subs going into Cuba, and they were developers there in a great front for the Cuban Missile Crisis again. And I saw mules in the middle of the night. Does anybody remember this? When I told you I saw a biological something coming in a container out of Cuba, trying to be smuggled into America for mass destruction. How many times have we prayed and the Spirit of the Lord has said, 'Watch Cuba. Watch Cuba. Pray over Cuba and what's about to take place.' Oh, America, watch Cuba, for great old alliances from the 1960s from the Cuban Missile Crisis will try to be reestablished. And I saw an extension cord going from Cuba into Russia, promising them financial freedom, promising them a new getting out from underneath the Western boot to join the BRICS, but they would have to align with them not just monetarily, but with military. And we're seeing it happen just like the Spirit of the Lord told us would. Do you have more on that? Yeah. Where's that video? I want you to play that video. Watch this video right here. You need to see this. This is what the Lord warned us about. So, there you go, y'all. Like I told you, watch Cuba, for old alliances from the 1960s will be reunited. They'll have a new spring forth, a growth coming out of Cuba. I warned you of this for months now, of what the Lord was telling us to watch in the middle of the night. Here you see fruit. This is very serious, a lot more serious than what people realize because of things that I've seen concerning this and the mules. It's the mules that are the problem, the smuggling. There's something major. And as we see the Trump administration attacking Venezuela, there were the other ones. Remember I said watch Venezuela, watch Cuba, watch Iran, for there will be an extension cord to these nations. Venezuela was about their oil, and I saw a warfront. If you go back and watch these videos, I saw a warfront trying to happen in the ocean concerning Venezuela. It's happening. They're saying it's a war on drug lords. It poses as a front. And I said black swan events would come forth. Do you all remember that? I said black swan events would start to come forth. I say a lot. The Holy Spirit does. The Holy Spirit warns you of a lot when we pray as a family. And so then we warn about Canada, and we warn about the other things. There was another thing that I wanted you to... Here's part of the word. You want to hear this? This isn't one of the times I've talked about it. If you help us over here, we're linking with China and Venezuela and all these other dark countries. 'Hey, you've been picked on by the West. You've had all these tariffs and sanctions and all this stuff put on you that you can't maneuver freely with your economy. Cuba, if you join up with us and help us with this, we will bring you out of the Western boot,' bringing them into a new era of financing, trying to position them, telling them everything's going to be okay if you join them up with the BRICS. So then I saw Cuba and it was highlighted, and the water around Cuba was crystal clear blue. But then it had a line and Cuba started to glow and it started to become alive. And I saw a spring of growth again coming up out of Cuba with leaves coming onto Cuba. And it was growing, but there was an extension. And I could see it had a line going from Cuba, like you would see like an internet cord coming out of Cuba into Russia, into that area. Okay, it looked like an extension cord making Cuba alive, and it started to glow around the border with an electricity light. It looked like whenever you have... Okay, I'll explain it to you like this. When you see a cloud, like a sun shining through the clouds, and you see the cloud glowing with light around it, and it comes through, and it's bleeding through the sun on the edges of the clouds. That's the way Cuba looked. But as it started to glow on the outskirts of the island, that land map, a new fountain of growth came up out of the middle of it as an extension cord was extended to them. So there, I have another one there, but it's all right. We won't watch it. It's just too much. It's redundant. It all basically is saying the same thing, warning you over and over again of what the enemy is trying to do. The other part was I heard General Flynn on Alex Jones warning about black swan events and major events taking place in America with the exact same things I've told you. Now, I thought it was very interesting because, you know, Alex Jones is pretty right on about some of his intel and the things that he brings forth. But as I watched this interview with Alex Jones, we have been infiltrated by al-Qaeda and other terrorist organizations in our country. And so it was quite alarming, but you can't play him because I'll get my video flagged, but maybe you can listen to General Flynn a little bit. But isn't that terrible? Somebody who's a truth teller, people get mad. You know, yeah, he misses it just like all of us do. But, you know, he's been boycotted. You can't even watch his videos on the internet without having egg thrown at you. But, you know, General Flynn, the whole thing was, buckle up. There's something major about to happen in America. People need to wake up. And this is why we have this prayer channel. It's to warn you ahead of time, before these people even see it, to warn you what the enemy is planning to try to kill, steal, and destroy. Then I warned you to pray over attacks against college campuses. And I even brought up Alabama, and I saw the Alabama area, and I told you, I said, 'You need to pray over Alabama. You need to pray over Texas. You need to pray over these college campuses.' And I've told you many times to pray over this over the last... So then we have a major shooting at a college campus at a game this weekend. At least two dead, multiple others, including a child, injured in a mass shooting after a college football game in Alabama. It happened. This is what I saw: stuff like this trying to take place to bring civil unrest even in a fun time in college games, and they can't find the shooter as of what I heard last. Maybe they have now. Did anybody know this took place? They don't bring it out on the news a lot. There's so much stuff going on. So, we have major protests tomorrow that we must pray over in New York City concerning September 7th in Israel. This is a major thing. General Flynn said they found more SIM cards in another area a couple of days ago, and he brought that up. General Flynn talked about it and told everybody they're finding this is a major, major operation. This is funded by... I told you, remember how many times I told you this isn't just anything that's normal. This is funded by big money. Every time I saw it, I saw it being funded by crypto and all kinds of different veins. And the Lord warned, and he said this is a huge operation funded by millions of dollars. I saw it was up to over hundreds of millions. Big money. Big money to get them here, paying the mules to get them here, to smuggle them. It is a major, major infiltration in our country to pray. And the Lord said it's not just about the big cities anymore; it's about the little towns, about the high school football games. And I remember I was driving down in Tulsa. I was praying, and the Lord said to me, he said, 'The very freedom you feel every day, that you don't have to be thinking is it okay to go to the grocery store today because we have law and order,' he said, 'that law and order in the days ahead, there's a storm coming and they're going to try to challenge that to try to bring disruption of peace in your nation.' So, you must pray. Pray over your president. Pray over Homeland Security. Pray over, excuse me, pray over ICE. Pray over the FBI. Pray over our people, that they would have wisdom and they would be able to expose the darkness that is trying to come on your land. But this did not just involve us. It was about Australia. And everybody, I warned about the Opera House and an uprising in Australia to bring fear and chaos in your country. And we see them protesting in Australia even yesterday. Thousands of people showed up and was protesting around that Opera House, one after another after another. And we saw that happening and protesting in this area. And I know people say, 'Brandon, you know, I get the, "Brandon, you just see gloom and doom." Is there anything good that you ever see? Are you just brought on the internet to bring fear? All you talk about is fear.' I said, 'You know what? The Lord said, "Brandon, I've called you to say the hard things, and I want you to have a backbone and warn the people of what's coming. Don't give them sugar on the lips like a lot of them do. I want you to tell them the hard things that are trying to come on the land."' And folks, there's fruit in what I'm telling you. I'm not just here to tell you bad things and say, "Hey, the sky is falling, Chicken Little," because I don't believe that. We have to rise up as believing believers and pray. But we have found that a lot of the churches have their head in the sand. I even had one guy say, "Well, you know, I watch you, but you scared my wife, so she doesn't want to know the reality of what's going on, Brandon. She wants to live like it's a fairy tale." They don't want to know what's happening in their nation, playing in that little town, Sharia law trying to come into our nation, but then playing that over the loudspeakers all over the town. Again, this is marching that is happening. Wait until tomorrow. Wait until tomorrow on the 7th for what they have planned. And I told you there will be great Antifa and other uprisings in our nation. Can you play that? This is in our small towns in America, folks. But most people don't. Then infiltrate. I guess that's just a normal day, right? We're just supposed to... No, we don't. We're not allowed to do all that stuff. If we put loudspeakers on there with Amazing Grace going across there, they'd say it's a public disturbance. "You're disturbing the peace. You better turn that down. You don't want to play Amazing Grace across the loudspeaker at the Baptist church. You're disturbing the peace. People can't sleep." Are you kidding me? Does anybody learn about that? I don't know, because I'm going to tell you what, that would weird me out if I lived in that town. If I'm driving down, trying to have dinner, and I hear that playing across the loudspeaker, that's eerie. That's weird. This is America, I'm telling y'all. So, what do you say? "Well, Brandon, what do you do about it?" You pray. But you have to know what's happening so that maybe it motivates you to get a little, or some, righteous indignation in you to say, "Listen, you either grab a hold of your freedoms and what you have, or you lose them." But to act like it's not happening is ignorance. You must wake up, America. You must wake up, New York, as you say you want to vote for this man who says he's Muslim, who wants to bring forth all this Sharia law into New York City, taking away your freedoms. And you say, "Well, we want that, we want this, we want that." You don't know what you want. You're binded with a reprobate mind, and the very freedoms that you take for granted are trying to be stripped away from you one at a time. And just like Canada, within a year you won't even be able to carry a firearm in your household to protect your family anymore. Won't even be able to post soon if they pass this new bill saying that you can't even put stuff on the internet at all. And they'll be able to push a button. "Sorry, you know, you're not politically correct. We don't like what you're saying. So, you know, you're now becoming a cyber threat." So they'll be able to push a button and take your rights away. The bills in your Senate or whatever you all have, your House Chambers or whatever you all do, you vote up there. We have judges blocking our president from bringing in the National Guard to try to establish peace in Chicago, to help reinforce against the illegal activity with MS-13 and all these gangs, to try to bring a deflation and corral these evildoers out of our nation. And you have judges saying, "We're going to block this. We don't want you, Seattle. We don't want you in here. You can't help us. We're going to block you with our judge orders." Do you not see that? Why are they helping so much to try to keep these people in there who are trying to destroy our nation? There's more to it than that. And I've seen it and I can't get into it. It's bigger than what you see. It's bigger than what you see. So I bring these to you. I bring this to you every single time like this to rattle your cage a little bit as we see the shootings, we see these things taking place. Was there anything else before we start praying? ICE-free zones. ICE-free zone. That's the one I'm talking about. Are you going to put that out? "Fox News: Chicago mayor creates ICE-free zones to block federal agents from city property." So that's what I'm talking about. You have the mayor saying, "Well, you can't bring law and order here." And you've got more people dying in Chicago than any other area, with mass shootings and all kinds of gangs and all kinds of bad stuff. I got this... I wanted to say this before we pray. I got this from a dear brother. He is a master potter and he teaches pottery in college. He's a professor of a pottery class. And he made this little cup for me. It's decorative. It's really pretty to me. He has the crown of thorns and the hands, and it has the cross and it has all kinds of cool stuff. But he made that, and I just thought, "Isn't that nice?" He sent that to me in the mail today. There was a set of them for Diana and me, two cups, and I just thought, "People think of the nicest things." And he wrote his name underneath it, dated it, and was just telling us that he loves us. But I thought, you know, he made it, he glazed it. I'll just set it on a shelf. It's too pretty to use. But I thought, "Isn't that amazing? People just thinking of you." It's just me saying thank you. But let's pray tonight, y'all. I tell you all that, like I said, just to fan that in you. Does that motivate you? Does that motivate you at all? When you see that stuff, that's why I try to bring it to you, not to bring fear, but to motivate you to pray for the neighborhoods that you don't want this trash happening. We even have them talking about Atlas, this new thing flying in the sky toward us. And I warned you about alien visitations—false alien visitations that would bring forth an excuse of where everybody goes in the rapture. And when Jesus told me on the edge of heaven, right before I came back into my body and came back into my room and he sent me back home, he said, "Brandon, one of the major signs that will happen before my return is there'll be false alien encounters. This will be a way to explain away the rapture." And, "You will know even more, Brandon, that it's getting closer to my return the more this starts to happen on the news." I even saw in the vision that there will be an alien deity, like an alien form, being interviewed on TV. Do you know the Bible says we entertain angels unaware? Fallen angels are angels, right? So if we can entertain angelic angels unaware, could you not entertain demonic spirits unaware that present themselves as angels of light to try to deceive the masses about what's coming? Ladies and gentlemen, do not be fooled about what's coming on the news. It is not ET. I have to warn you, what is coming is not ET. You say, "Oh, Brandon, that's way out there. I don't believe that." I'm telling you, a great deception is coming. Men's hearts will fail them for fear, looking after those things that are coming on the earth, for the powers of heaven will be shaken. I warned you about the sun getting darker and that we would start to see that the animals, ducks, the migration of animals would be confused in the days ahead. We have NASA warning that it looks like the sun is getting darker. I said there'll be things that take place with our sun. There'll be things that take place with our sun that even the breeding habits of animals will be thrown off the rut, with deer, or with elk, or with the antelope, or whatever. They'll start to breed too early and not have spring babies, but have winter babies. Do you understand? Things are going to start to get really weird. Birds are going to start flying south way too early. You're going to see a haze upon the land. The Lord said, "Even the light will be affected upon your land." He warned us about this. I thought it was from volcanic ash because I see in part. I don't always get the whole thing. So, I thought, "What is going to cause this?" I've always tried to just be quiet, you know, and just pray in the spirit and ask the Lord, "Show me more. What's going to cause this? Why would the sun start acting weird? Why would we have the sun look dimmer? I don't know. Is it from all the stuff they're releasing in the chemtrails and all the stuff they're releasing? Is it some kind of warfare? I told you that they were weather manipulation." But we hear NASA talking about Earth is getting darker. NASA warns. And I thought, but to what extent will it? Because I've seen it become really, really, really strange that it looks like twilight. That it will look like twilight. Like whenever you're in an eclipse and it's kind of a haze, that's the way the sun will start to look soon. And I thought, "Excuse me, what caused that?" I said, "Lord, what causes that?" Remember in the Welsh revival, if you go back and you study the Welsh revival, the miners had to retrain the mules because the mules only knew how to do commands by cussing. And whenever the great Welsh revival, the Holy Ghost and fire showed up in the Welsh revival, and there came such a mighty repentance in that area that people didn't cuss and act out anymore. And so when they were in the bars, the bars closed down. The miners couldn't get the mules to operate right because they didn't know how to do anything because they were only used to somebody cussing at them. So they had to retrain the mules. So what I'm trying to tell you is, as I even saw the porn industry being challenged in Hollywood because the Holy Ghost and fire is going to show up in those areas and you're going to see people that were in that kind of industry get radically born again and they won't have nobody. You say, "Oh, that can't happen." But you don't know my God. You don't know my God. If God can do it once with the miners up there, and shut down the whole industry in the Welsh revival, how much more will he do it today? How much more will he visit your nation today? He's no respecter of persons, but he is a respecter of faith. How much will you believe him for the impossible today? How much will you believe him that God is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think? If God would move once, he will do it again. It's time to believe him for bigger. As we see all these things on the news, you believe God for protection for your kids as they go to these college football games and high school football games. And you grandmas and grandpas and grannies and your mamas and daddies go around praying and pleading the blood of Jesus over your areas that stuff like this doesn't happen again in Alabama. I saw a mass plan. I saw a mass plan from a man named George. And the devil himself visited a man named George. And because he visited this man, their plan was to create chaos in America. And George brought his other minions and the financial backing from these minions with a plan to kill, steal, and destroy. I saw a man. I don't use his last name because it's not necessary. Don't want to be called that I'm defaming anybody, but I can use a first name because nobody knows, and you don't know who George is, right? Just George. So, we pray for these people because they don't know what they do. They're full of the devil and they need a radical visitation from Jesus. Wouldn't it be amazing if George got born again? Wouldn't that be amazing? Or a man named Bill gets really born again. Wouldn't that be amazing? And he all of a sudden gets really radically saved. Bill gets really radically saved because it wouldn't take much. One moment with Jesus, one visitation from our Father can change any hardened heart. It doesn't matter how dark you are. One visitation from Jesus can change even the darkest terrorist who wants to create jihad in this nation in the days ahead. "The eagle," they say. I'm hearing a lot in the spirit realm. I've never heard chatter—I want you to really hear me right now, I want you to really take what I'm saying seriously—I have never heard chatter in the spirit realm as I'm praying with my spiritual antenna up as a watchman like I have this last week. Never. And I have been doing this a long time. I could write pages of notes of warnings inside of warning things that I can't put on the internet anymore. I want my channel to stay up for you. Do you understand? The louder it gets and the more attention my channel gets, the more other people are watching. And I can be bold to an extent, but I'm on their platform. This is not mine; I'm borrowing it. I'm thankful that they allow me to come on here and speak, but I'm in their house talking on their channel. And Diana and I talked about, "So what happens if they unplug it?" Well, I'll go to Facebook Live. How long will that last? I don't know. Facebook's probably more liberal than even Google. But you can say so much on these platforms whenever your channel gets this size. Smaller channels don't get as much traffic; they don't seem to be paying attention. But the larger you get and the more you talk on a live like this, you don't say certain things. And I know I say a lot, so I'm thankful that I'm still here, you know, when you have the audience and the Lord's bringing it. So, glory to God. It doesn't matter. Let's just keep praying and pleading the blood of Jesus, and He'll keep us on. So, we warn you of what's coming. So, did that bless you tonight? It probably didn't bless you, but at least it gives you something to pray over. You want to take communion with me? You can take it with me. Father, I thank you, Lord, for the body. Before we dip in the river, we always praise you and give you glory for all that you've done. For we know that it's not about us; it's all about you. We know that we're just a vessel, that you could use anybody. We know, Father, that no matter how dark it is out there and you feel the devil trying to nip at your feet, you say, "Oh, you're under my feet. I'm not afraid of you. I have power and authority over you." I thank you, Father, that even the maneuvering of the devils behind people to try to inflict any weirdness—I'll just say it like that, Father—has no ability to hurt my family in any way. I thank you, Father, that we're always in that shelter of the Most High. As I keep reading Psalm 91, I thank you. A thousand may fall at your side and 10,000 at your right hand, but it shall not come nigh you. Only a spectator shall you be, yourself inaccessible. You like that? That's one of my favorites. Yourself inaccessible in the secret place of the Most High. I'm inaccessible. My wife, my children are inaccessible. You are inaccessible. Do you like that? I love that. Only a spectator. We can only see what's going on. "Shall you be yourself inaccessible in the secret place of the Most High as you witness the reward of the wicked." So, we're inaccessible, but we're watching because we're watchmen. We're praying because you have made the Lord your refuge and the Most High your dwelling place. See, you have made Him. I meditate on that. Because you have made the Lord your refuge. What is a refuge? I run to Him. He's my protector. He's got me. He's the Most High, your dwelling place. I dwell there. I sit at His feet. He is my Lord. He is my shepherd; I shall not want. There shall no evil befall you, nor any plague or calamity come near your tent. So no viruses that I've seen coming, no plagues, no pestilences are going to come near my tent. For he will give his angels a special charge over you to accompany and defend and preserve you in all your ways, in all your ways of obedience and service. They shall bear you up in their hands, lest you dash your foot against a stone. Thank you, Lord. You shall tread upon the lion and the young lion and the serpent. Shall you trample underfoot?
